Details: Quick tour of Salesforce, Chargebee, Intercom, Aircall, Talkhub - where to find things (not deep dive - that's Week 2)
Given 3 real merchant emails, find them in Salesforce + Chargebee. Document: account status, subscription plan, hardware ordered, assigned MOM. Use provided worksheet.
Player explains findings from exercise. Coach validates understanding of where to find key info.
Read Welcome Call script. Annotate: key questions to ask, data points to collect, common merchant concerns. Note questions for walkthrough.
Listen to 2 actual Welcome Call recordings. Complete analysis worksheet: What went well? What could improve? How did MOM handle objections?
Script highlights, critical moments, common mistakes to avoid. Q&A on recordings analyzed.
Self-record Welcome Call using real merchant scenario (provided). Upload to Lark for coach review. Focus on: intro, key questions, setting expectations.
Watch your own recording. Note 3 improvement areas. Prepare for Practice #2 tomorrow. Complete Day 4 reflection form.
Self-record second attempt using DIFFERENT merchant scenario. Apply improvements from Day 4 self-review. Upload to Lark.
Compare Practice #1 and #2 recordings. Document improvements made and remaining gaps.
Coach reviews both video submissions + brief live Q&A. Scorecard covers: intro, questions asked, tone, objection handling, closing. 80% pass required.
Read Go Live script. Understand common Day 1 issues: printer not printing, network issues, staff confusion. Note how hardware troubleshooting (Day 3) applies.
Listen to 2 actual Go Live calls. Complete worksheet: How did MOM handle stress? What troubleshooting steps? How did they calm the merchant?
Key moments in Go Live call. Handling stressed merchants. Quick hardware recap (from Day 3). Common scenarios and solutions.
Self-record Go Live with 2 issues (e.g., printer not printing + network slow). Use real merchant scenario. Upload to Lark.
Watch recording. Note improvement areas. What would you do differently? Complete Day 5 reflection form.
Self-record second attempt with DIFFERENT merchant scenario and different issues (e.g., order stuck + staff needs help). Apply improvements.
Compare Practice #1 and #2. Document improvements and remaining gaps before assessment.
Coach reviews both video submissions + brief live Q&A. Scorecard covers: problem identification, troubleshooting steps, merchant reassurance, resolution. 80% pass required.
Quick review of F&B + Retail training decks. Understand structure (not memorization). Note key demo points for each section.
Self-record 10-min demo of key slides (menu management + order flow). Upload to Lark. Focus on clarity and merchant perspective.
Coach reviews video + brief Q&A. Scorecard covers: clarity, demo flow, handling questions. 80% pass required.
Review top 3 features to upsell: QR Order & Pay, Beep Delivery, Engage. Understand value proposition for each.
Recap all learnings. Open Q&A. Address concerns. Set expectations for Week 2.
Brief on targets: 35 merchants/month, 85% completed in <15 days, 95% SLA compliance, 90% CSAT. What success looks like.
TL introduces Week 2 plan: Tools deep dive, shadowing, buddying. Sets expectations for practical training.
